task_completion.description: Navigate to the ADAudit Plus login page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser address bar shows http://localhost:8081 and the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus login screen is visible.
The ADAudit Plus main dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login with the 'admin' account.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Support Information File generation section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Support', 'Troubleshooting', or 'Support Information File' page or modal is open within the ADAudit Plus interface.

task_completion.description: Exclude 'Database Logs' from the support file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox or toggle specifically for 'Database Logs' is unchecked or explicitly excluded in the support file generation options.

task_completion.description: Generate and obtain the Support Information File
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message confirming the Support Information File generation, or a browser download indicator/file explorer showing a file named matching the pattern 'Support_*.zip' (e.g., Support_ADAuditPlus_<Timestamp>.zip).

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to generate the file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and ADAudit Plus UI, rather than terminal commands (like curl or wget) or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the real ADAudit Plus application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches ManageEngine ADAudit Plus, not a text editor, mock HTML page, or generic form.

integrity.description: The support file was generated by the application, not manually created
integrity.visual_evidence: The file appears as a download from the browser or a success prompt within the app, rather than the agent manually zipping files in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: ManageEngine ADAudit Plus is hosted at http://localhost:8081. Valid credentials are admin / Admin@2024. The generated Support Information File will follow the naming pattern Support_*.zip (e.g., Support_ADAuditPlus_<Timestamp>.zip). The agent must use the UI to exclude 'Database Logs' before generating the file.
